S.FORM: Malik Beasley hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tay suruw / p'agal tins' tay suruw. kawas tay 1996, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 11, Malik Beasley, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: malik Œ≤eas~…ïlej ƒßja î…£a nŒ≤a p…£naw î mari î mis~…ïuw qanij, qutux s~…ïa p îaras~…ï mari î taj s~…ïuruw / p îa…£al tins~…ï î taj s~…ïuruw. kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj **, malik Œ≤eas~…ïlej, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
